title: NYC Primaries: Three DSA-Backed Candidates Win Congressional Races
description: Three candidates endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America won their congressional primary races in New York City, all with documented statements supporting Palestinian terrorism and opposing U.S. counter-terrorism operations.

title: DSA National Convention Refuses to Condemn Hamas October 7 Attack
description: The Democratic Socialists of America's national leadership declined to condemn the Hamas attack on Israel, instead framing it as legitimate resistance to settler colonialism. The statement drew widespread condemnation from lawmakers.

title: CAIR Named Unindicted Co-Conspirator in Holy Land Foundation Hamas Financing Trial
description: The Council on American-Islamic Relations was named as an unindicted co-conspirator in the largest terrorism financing prosecution in U.S. history. CAIR has since become a major donor network and endorsement partner for DSA-aligned candidates.

title: Justice Democrats PAC Deploys $11.2M for DSA-Aligned Federal Candidates
description: The Justice Democrats political action committee, co-founded by AOC's former chief of staff, raised and deployed over $11 million in the 2022 cycle for DSA-endorsed and DSA-aligned federal candidates across 22 races.

title: Rashida Tlaib Censured by U.S. House for Hamas-Linked Slogan
description: The U.S. House of Representatives voted to censure Rep. Rashida Tlaib after she promoted the phrase 'from the river to the sea, Palestine will be free' — a slogan widely recognized as a Hamas rallying cry calling for the elimination of Israel.

title: DSA Officially Endorses BDS Movement — Joins Anti-Israel Boycott Campaign
description: The Democratic Socialists of America voted at their national convention to officially endorse the Boycott, Divestment, Sanctions movement targeting Israel. BDS co-founder Omar Barghouti has documented ties to Hamas leadership.

title: Venezuela: 7.7 Million Flee Socialism — The DSA's Praised Model Collapses
description: Venezuela has produced the largest refugee crisis in the Western Hemisphere as Maduro's socialist government continues to collapse. DSA members and Squad representatives praised the Chavez model as recently as 2019.

title: AOC Votes NO on Iron Dome Funding — Roll Call 309
description: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez was among nine House members to vote against $1 billion in Iron Dome missile defense funding for Israel, initially voting present before switching to no amid DSA chapter pressure.
